news.title: Anthropic to challenge DOD’s supply-chain label in court
news.summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said he plans to challenge the Department of Defense's designation of the AI firm as a supply-chain risk. He claims most Anthropic customers are unaffected by the label.

news.title: Cluely CEO Roy Lee admits to publicly lying about revenue numbers last year
